scripts.dev: sh -c 'npm --workspace apps/api run dev & sleep 2 && npm --workspace apps/web run dev & wait'
scripts.deploy:web: sh -c 'test -n "$CLOUDFLARE_PAGES_PROJECT_NAME" && BRANCH="${CLOUDFLARE_PAGES_BRANCH:-main}" && npm --workspace apps/web run build && npm --workspace apps/api exec -- wrangler pages deploy ../web/dist --project-name "$CLOUDFLARE_PAGES_PROJECT_NAME" --branch "$BRANCH"'
